final_plan:
#Task1: Identify if any time series forecasting models are supported by the available agents.
#Agent1: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Confirmation on whether time series forecasting models are supported.

#Task2: Analyze the capability of the identified model for energy forecasting.
#Agent2: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Details on how the model can be used for energy forecasting.

#Task3: Verify if the model can be applied to a specific asset, such as a chiller.
#Agent3: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency3: #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Information on relevant sensors for the asset that can be used with the forecasting model.

#Task4: Generate a work order for maintenance based on the forecasting model's output.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: A work order for inspecting or maintaining the asset based on the forecasting results.
